free_text: Details of focal plane detector described
superconducting cyclotron at Texas A&M University.
Reaction product were momentum analyzed using
Focal plane counter consisted of a
gridded ionization chamber with position sensitive
proportional counters, 300 mm long, 510 mm deep and
with an active height of 60 mm. Detector properties
obtained are 0.6 mm position resolution and 1% total
